title: taraxacum oelandicum
intro: Taraxacum oelandicum, also known as Icelandic dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are believed to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as improving liver function, reducing blood pressure, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum oelandicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
